theme.name: Editorial Amber
theme.reason: Warm and minimal for design-forward and content-heavy portfolios.

profile.name: Vercel
profile.bio: Develop. Preview. Ship. Creators of Next.js.

portfolio.summary: Develop. Preview. Ship. Creators of Next.js. The portfolio draft reflects focused most often on TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, and HTML and based in United States of America, with selected work such as turborepo, ai, and hyper.

headline.value: Develop. Preview. Ship. Creators of Next.js.

subheadline.value: Built from 6 featured repositories drawn from recent public GitHub work with a focus on TypeScript, JavaScript, and Rust. This draft starts from real code, repository context, and README signals instead of placeholder portfolio copy.

description.value: Develop. Preview. Ship. Creators of Next.js. Based in United States of America. Selected repositories and README content are being used to shape the project story and technical focus.
Share the clearest way to connect for roles, freelance work, collaborations, or portfolio conversations.
Add the professional destinations you want visitors to open next, including your resume, cover letter, LinkedIn, Handshake, and portfolio links.

repositories.name: vercel/next.js
repositories.readmeExcerpt: Used by some of the world's largest companies, Next.js enables you to create full-stack web applications by extending the latest React features, and integrating powerful Rust-based JavaScript tooling for the fastest builds.

repositories.name: vercel/hyper
repositories.description: A terminal built on web technologies
repositories.readmeExcerpt: The goal of the project is to create a beautiful and extensible experience for command-line interface users, built on open web standards. In the beginning, our focus will be primarily around speed, stability and the development of the correct API for extension authors.

repositories.name: vercel/swr
repositories.readmeExcerpt: The name “**SWR**” is derived from stale-while-revalidate, a cache invalidation strategy popularized by HTTP RFC 5861. **SWR** first returns the data from cache (stale), then sends the request (revalidate), and finally comes with the up-to-date data again.

repositories.name: vercel/turborepo
repositories.description: Build system optimized for JavaScript and TypeScript, written in Rust
repositories.readmeExcerpt: Turborepo is a high-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases, written in Rust.

repositories.name: vercel/ai
repositories.description: The AI Toolkit for TypeScript. From the creators of Next.js, the AI SDK is a free open-source library for building AI-powered applications and agents
repositories.readmeExcerpt: The AI SDK is a provider-agnostic TypeScript toolkit designed to help you build AI-powered applications and agents using popular UI frameworks like Next.js, React, Svelte, Vue, Angular, and runtimes like Node.js.

repositories.name: vercel/chatbot
repositories.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel
repositories.readmeExcerpt: Chatbot (formerly AI Chatbot) is a free, open-source template built with Next.js and the AI SDK that helps you quickly build powerful chatbot applications.
